title: oxalis trientalis
intro: Oxalis trientalis, also known as the woodland sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the wood-sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The plant is rich in ascorbic acid, vitamins, and minerals, providing various health benefits such as boosting the immune system, reducing oxidative stress, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Oxalis trientalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
